chunks.en: Every morning, I drink a cup of coffee.
chunks.ja: 毎朝、私はコーヒーを一杯飲みます。

chunks.en: I have it right after I wake up.
chunks.ja: 起きてすぐにそれを飲みます。

chunks.en: I usually drink it in the kitchen.
chunks.ja: たいてい台所でそれを飲みます。

chunks.en: I like my coffee hot, not cold.
chunks.ja: 私はコーヒーを冷たくなく、温かいのが好きです。

chunks.en: I make it with hot water and instant coffee.
chunks.ja: お湯とインスタントコーヒーで作ります。

chunks.en: After I drink it, I feel more awake.
chunks.ja: それを飲んだ後、私はもっと目が覚めます。

chunks.en: The warm drink helps me start my work.
chunks.ja: 温かい飲み物は仕事を始めるのに役立ちます。

chunks.en: So coffee is a happy part of my morning.
chunks.ja: だからコーヒーは私の朝の楽しい一部です。

outline: Opening: what I drink in the morning
Point 1: when and where I have it
Point 2: hot coffee and how I make it
Wrap-up: how it makes me feel

modelTalk.text: I love my morning drink. I drink coffee every day. It's my favorite thing. I make it right after I wake up. I go to the kitchen first. The house is still quiet then. I like my coffee hot. I boil some water in a pot. Then I add coffee and a little milk. I don't use much sugar. Sometimes I drink tea, but not often. I hold my warm cup with both hands. It feels so nice and calm. After I drink it, I feel awake. My head is clear now. I'm ready for my day. It's a small thing, but I love it.

chunks.en: Every morning I drink a cup of hot coffee.
chunks.ja: 毎朝、私は温かいコーヒーを一杯飲みます。

chunks.en: I have it right after I wake up.
chunks.ja: 私は起きてすぐにそれを飲みます。

chunks.en: I make it in my small kitchen.
chunks.ja: 私は自分の小さな台所でそれを作ります。

chunks.en: I like it hot, not cold.
chunks.ja: 私は冷たいのではなく、温かいのが好きです。

chunks.en: I use hot water and instant coffee.
chunks.ja: 私はお湯とインスタントコーヒーを使います。

chunks.en: After I drink it, I feel awake and calm.
chunks.ja: それを飲んだ後、私は目が覚めて落ち着いた気分になります。

chunks.en: So coffee is a nice start to my day.
chunks.ja: だからコーヒーは私の一日の良いスタートです。

outline: Opening: I drink hot coffee every morning
Point 1: When and where I make it
Point 2: Hot coffee, how I prepare it
Wrap-up: How it makes me feel

modelTalk.text: I love my morning drink. I drink coffee every day. I make it hot and strong. First, I get up and I go to the kitchen. My kitchen is small, but it's warm. I boil some water in a pot. Then I put coffee in my cup. I add a little milk too. I don't like too much sugar. Sometimes I drink tea, but not often. I sit by the window and I look outside. The coffee smells really nice. I drink it slowly. After that, I feel happy and awake. I'm ready to start my day now. It's my favorite time.
